commitResults.messageTitle: feat: add exception hierarchy and input validation
commitResults.messageBody:
- Add CcaLedgerException as base exception class
- Add CcaNotFoundException, ResidentNotFoundException, DuplicateCcaException,
  DuplicateResidentException, ResidentAlreadyInCcaException, InvalidCommandException
- Add input validation in Parser for all commands
- Fix unsafe stream lookups in AddResidentToCcaCommand
- Fix UnknownCommand to support custom message
feat: add exception hierarchy and input validation

commitResults.messageTitle: test: add junit tests for input handling
commitResults.messageBody:
- Add duplicate CCA and duplicate resident tests in AddCcaCommandTest
  and AddResidentCommandTest
- Add empty list and invalid name tests in DeleteCcaCommandTest
- Add new AddResidentToCcaCommandTest covering success, CCA not found,
  resident not found, and resident already in CCA
- Add new ParserTest covering valid commands, missing arguments,
  unknown commands, and null/empty input
test: add junit tests for input handling

commitResults.messageTitle: feat: add flat-file persistence for all app data
commitResults.messageBody:
- Add StorageManager with save/load for 5 data files:
  ccas.txt, residents.txt, events.txt, memberships.txt,
  and event_attendance.txt
- Use pipe-delimited format with escape handling for
  special characters in field values
- Load order respects FK dependencies between files
- Corrupt or unresolvable rows are skipped with warnings
  rather than crashing the application
- Wire StorageManager into CcaLedger: load on startup,
  save after every mutating command
- Add isReadOnly() to Command base class; override in all
  view/stats/help commands to skip unnecessary saves
- Add findByName() to CcaManager, findByMatric() to
  ResidentManager, findByNameAndCca() to EventManager
  to support FK resolution during load

commitResults.messageTitle: docs: add data storage section to developer guide
commitResults.messageBody:
- Document StorageManager architecture and its role in
  the overall layer diagram
- Describe all 5 file formats with column tables and
  examples (ccas, residents, events, memberships,
  event_attendance)
- Explain save and load behaviour including trigger
  conditions and full-snapshot strategy
- Document FK resolution on load and the three finder
  methods required
- Detail membership load edge case for exco members
- Cover escape/unescape logic for pipe-delimited fields
- Add error resilience pattern used across all load methods
- Include sequence diagrams for both save and load flows
- Add design considerations explaining file-per-table
  approach and plain-text over database decision

commitResults.messageTitle: fix: validate points input in AddResidentToCcaCommand
commitResults.messageBody:
- Replaced assert with a checked InvalidPointsException thrown in the constructor for invalid points input
- Handles both non-integer strings and negative values.
- Parser catches the exception and returns an UnknownCommand with the error message.
- Tests updated to reflect the checked exception and cover new validation cases.
fix: validate points input in AddResidentToCcaCommand

commitResults.messageTitle: fix: remove resident from CCAs and exco on deletion
commitResults.messageBody:
- DeleteResidentCommand now calls removeResidentFromAllCcas() before deleting the resident, mirroring the existing pattern in DeleteCcaCommand.
- Prevents stale resident references appearing in CCA member and exco lists after deletion.
fix: remove resident from CCAs and exco on deletion
Fixed #98

commitResults.messageTitle: fix: guard against null resident in ViewMyEvents
commitResults.messageBody:
- Moved the null check for the resident ahead of the eventManager call to prevent a NullPointerException when view-my-event is run after the resident has been deleted.
- Returns a clean error message instead of crashing.
fix: guard against null resident in ViewMyEvents

commitResults.messageTitle: fix: del static from membership lists in managers
commitResults.messageBody:
Static fields caused all manager instances to share the same list,
making in-session deletions inconsistent with post-restart state.
Removing static ensures each instance owns its list and mutations
are reflected immediately in all views.
fix: del static from membership lists in managers
Update UG and DG: Change matric number to unique identifier

commitResults.messageTitle: fix: resolve parser arg handling and duplicate CCA
commitResults.messageBody:
- Updated parser so commands entered without arguments return usage
  messages instead of "Unknown command"
- Fixed Resident.addCcaToResident() to update existing CCA entries
  rather than creating duplicate CCA-point records
- Resolves duplicate CCA breakdown entries in view-points output
fix: resolve parser arg handling and duplicate CCA
